chief_complaint: Three young African patients, two females and one male, presented with thyrotoxicosis due to Graves' disease.
history: The patients had a history of Graves' disease and presented with drug ineffectiveness, drug-induced agranulocytosis, and thyroid storm with multi-organ failure.
exam: No specific vital signs or physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific laboratory results are provided, but the patients underwent plasmapheresis sessions.
correct_diagnosis: Thyroid storm due to Graves' disease
differentials: Thyroid storm due to Graves' disease
correct_ranking: Thyroid storm due to Graves' disease
